title: Display email as plain text instead of clickable link

requirements.summary: Replace mailto anchor link for profxhandyman@gmail.com with a plain, non-clickable text element in the Contact component
acceptanceCriteria: The email address profxhandyman@gmail.com is visible in the Contact section.
Clicking or hovering over the email address does not navigate or open an email client.
No anchor tag or mailto: href is used for the email display.
The email text styling matches the surrounding contact info text.

file_operations.description: Replace the mailto anchor link for profxhandyman@gmail.com with a plain text element (span or p). Remove the anchor tag and href attribute, keeping only the email address as static text. Ensure the text styling (color, font weight, size) matches the surrounding contact information text for visual consistency.
